global.description: The ad features a vibrant orange background with bold text and clear calls to action.
global.main_message: Promoting a travel booking service with a focus on convenience.

elements.label: Ad background
elements.description: Full canvas background of the mobile advertisement.

elements.label: RouteBloon UGC
elements.description: A bold, uppercase text label in a dark color, prominently displayed at the top of the ad.

elements.label: Fly smarter Hotels
elements.description: A medium-sized text in a lighter color, conveying a message about smarter travel options.

elements.label: flights in one tap
elements.description: A smaller text below the main body text, emphasizing convenience in travel booking.

elements.label: Background shapes
elements.description: Abstract geometric shapes in a warm color palette, creating a visually engaging background.

elements.label: Order now
elements.description: A prominent button with rounded edges, inviting users to take action with a clear call to action.

elements.label: Small circle
elements.description: A small circular shape in a light color, serving as a decorative element in the design.

elements.label: Small rectangle
elements.description: A small rectangular shape, possibly a decorative element, positioned towards the bottom of the ad.

elements.label: Medium rectangle
elements.description: A medium-sized rectangle in a light color, positioned in the center of the ad, possibly decorative.

elements.label: Top banner
elements.description: A wide banner at the top of the ad, providing a background for the headline text.

elements.label: Hotels + flights
elements.description: A text element that highlights the services offered, positioned centrally in the ad.
elements.text_content: Fly smarter Hotels flights in one tap

elements.label: Order button
elements.description: A clear, rounded button at the bottom of the ad, encouraging immediate action from viewers.
